title: Dashboard - tag by workstream

posts.author: rodieade (Adeline Rodier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,
I am setting up a dashboard connecting to multiple boards which have the same structure across several workspaces. As an example I am collecting issues from issues log - one in each workstream.
It would be very useful to have an option when creating a widget to identify as label on the chart the workspace - for example to see count of issues by workspace instead of having to review all details.
Thanks in advance
